subcodes.first_line: O spiritual companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! The noble Mírzá Faraj'u'lláh Khán hath been moved by the power of divine grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی عبدالبهاء و اماء رحمان جناب میرزا فرج الله خان را قوه کرم حرکت
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for forgiveness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @personal instructions
